name: MSI B760 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6800+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax (B760GPWIFI)

description: Mainstream ATX gaming motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, DDR5 support, and Wi-Fi 6E.
